name: Edge Intelligence in Civil Aviation: Paradigms, Techniques, and Applications

description: arXiv:2607.19676v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Civil aviation is safety critical and its operations, from flight decks and towers to ramps and maintenance, generate massive, heterogeneous data at the network edge. Yet cloud centric deployment of large Artificial Intelligence (AI) models often produces high task latency, lacks offline capability in communication denied environments, and require...
author: Wenbin Li, Zhongtian Liao, Bolin Liu, Yongjie Zhou, Jingling Wu, Xiaoyong Lin, Jing Chen
